title: aquifolium japonicum
intro: Aquifolium japonicum, also known as Japanese Holly or Japanese Holly Tree, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Aquifolium japonicum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
